positive: A minimalist and abstract illustration representing 'Growth.' It consists of interconnected, flowing line art elements and geometric shapes (circles, arcs) forming a balanced, symmetrical pattern. Clean negative space, black and gold ink style, Bauhaus influence, suitable for a repeating pattern or embroidery.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy sketch, color gradients
